# misp_taxonomy (Data Source)

Look up a MISP taxonomy by namespace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_taxonomy" "tlp" {
  namespace = "tlp"
}

output "tlp_enabled" {
  value = data.misp_taxonomy.tlp.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `exclusive` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `required` (Boolean)
- `version` (String)
